customer_input: Disease + which metastatic cascade step is of interest (e.g. colonization of brain).
internal_computation: Maps the question onto the 8-step metastasis cascade framework to scope which biology matters for that step.
customer_facing_output: Step-specific metastasis hypothesis map (which cascade step, what biology is implicated).
execution_status: data-backed but framework-driven (8-step cascade is a documented model, not a per-tumor causal map)
human_step: Analyst confirms the cascade step and disease context are correct.
product_safe_claim: Provides a step-specific metastasis hypothesis map to focus the target search.
prohibited_claim: A complete causal map of metastasis for this patient/tumor.

customer_input: Candidate target universe (gene list) OR request to curate one.
internal_computation: Loads/curates the target universe. Version A: 38-gene panel benchmark. Version B: caller-supplied universe via POST /targets.
customer_facing_output: Defined target universe scoped to the mission.
execution_status: executable and live (POST /targets) for caller-supplied universe; 38-gene panel is a fixed benchmark set
human_step: Team decides the target universe boundaries and inclusion rationale.
product_safe_claim: Curates and scopes a target universe for a defined metastasis mission.
prohibited_claim: An exhaustive or guaranteed-complete target universe.

internal_computation: Composite Target-Lock scoring. Version A: Evo2 + Enformer + AF3, threshold >=0.35. Version B (production): Evo2 + regulatory/repressor + AF3 (Enformer GATED OFF).
customer_facing_output: Ranked target report with per-model evidence contributions and uncertainty.
execution_status: executable and live (production brm_engine); Enformer offline; benchmark AUROC is internal-consistency only
human_step: Target-discovery lead reviews ranked targets and selects candidates to pursue.
product_safe_claim: Prioritizes candidate metastasis drivers with a transparent, per-model evidence trace.
prohibited_claim: Validated target discovery, guaranteed target success, or external-validation AUROC 0.689.

customer_input: Specific variant(s) or gene sequence context to interrogate.
internal_computation: Evo2-derived evolutionary-constraint / functionality signal via POST /score-variant.
human_step: Computational biologist interprets the signal in study context.
product_safe_claim: Provides sequence-context interpretation (evolutionary constraint) for a variant/target.
prohibited_claim: Clinical pathogenicity diagnosis without required validation.

internal_computation: Generates CRISPR guide/spacer candidates for the target.
execution_status: data-backed design output (CRISPR perturbation design capability); wet-lab efficacy unproven
evidence_source: capability:CAP_04 (Interception target-and-guide workspace); Interception capability inventory | crispro_kg_v2/kg_modules/capability_registry.json
human_step: CRISPR/functional-genomics lead selects guides for synthesis.
product_safe_claim: Generates ranked CRISPR perturbation (guide) candidates for a chosen target.
prohibited_claim: A guide guaranteed to work in the wet lab.

internal_computation: Efficacy heuristics + CFD-style off-target scoring (brain-met pipeline).
customer_facing_output: Off-target risk record + efficacy ranking (pre-synthesis design-risk review).
execution_status: data-backed but manual/audit-scope for CFD off-target (older-KB evidence); not a genomic safety certification
evidence_source: brain-met pipeline CFD off-target (crispro_capability_kb / v1_1_0 audit streams, evidence-lookup scope); capability:CAP_04
human_step: Team decides acceptable off-target risk threshold and final guide set.
product_safe_claim: Provides a pre-synthesis off-target design-risk review for candidate guides.

customer_input: Ranked targets + guides + the metastasis mission.
internal_computation: Mission-fit scoring: does the target/perturbation match the defined metastatic-step mission?
human_step: Program lead judges whether the fit justifies experimental spend.
product_safe_claim: Scores how well a target/perturbation fits the defined metastasis mission.
prohibited_claim: A guarantee that a high-mission-fit target will succeed clinically.

customer_input: Target gene(s) for structural confidence check.
internal_computation: AlphaFold3 structural modeling via GET /af3-spec/{gene}, under study-defined gates. ONLY AF3 model 0 reported.
customer_facing_output: Structural modeling receipt + gate result (pLDDT confidence).
human_step: Structural/comp-bio reviewer interprets confidence and druggability.
product_safe_claim: Provides an AF3 structural-confidence receipt and gate result to support design confidence.
prohibited_claim: Experimental confirmation or therapeutic structural validation; AF3 'pass' as validation.

internal_computation: Assembles the end-to-end assessment package via POST /assess.
customer_facing_output: Experiment-handoff package (targets, guides, off-target records, structural receipts, rationale).
human_step: Wet-lab partner receives the package and plans the experiment.
product_safe_claim: Delivers a traceable experiment-handoff package for wet-lab execution.
prohibited_claim: That the handoff replaces experimental validation.

internal_computation: Structures a validation-design roadmap (which experiments de-risk the hypothesis).
customer_facing_output: Validation Design Package: prioritized experiments to run.
execution_status: data-backed guidance; the experiments themselves are the partner's wet-lab work
human_step: Partner executes and owns all wet-lab / functional validation.
product_safe_claim: Proposes a prioritized wet-lab validation roadmap to de-risk the target/guide hypothesis.
prohibited_claim: That CrisPRO performs or guarantees the validation outcome.
